data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for linkage to access tokens/artifacts and delivery events.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'Linkage to access tokens/artifacts and delivery events', but there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or functionality of an API or mechanism that implements this linkage. The prior steps do not address this requirement, indicating a gap in coverage. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive as there is no concrete evidence to support or refute the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of linkage to access tokens/artifacts and delivery events.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the linkage requirement.
